mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.user_id AS "userId", a.user_id AS "accountId", a.user_id AS "backendUserId", a.project_member_id AS "projectMemberId", a.role_name AS "roleName", a.role_name AS "role", u.name, u.name AS "userName", u.avatar, u.phone, a.signature_url AS "signatureUrl", a.signature_url AS "url", a.signature_url AS "filePath", CASE WHEN a.signature_url IS NULL OR a.signature_url = '' THEN false ELSE true END AS "signed", a.signed_at AS "signedAt", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM inspection_participant a LEFT JOIN sys_account u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.inspection_id = #{inspectionId} ORDER BY a.id ASC
